title: S.O. No. 934(E) dated 29.10.1998 - Reconstitution of Animal Welfare Board of India
description: S.O. No. 934(E) dated 29.10.1998 - Reconstitution of Animal Welfare Board of India
text: REGD. NO. D. L.-33004/98 The Gazette of India EXTRAORDINARY PART II—Section 3—Sub-section (ii) PUBLISHED BY AUTHORITY No. 706] NEW DELHI, THURSDAY, OCTOBER 29, 1998/KARTIKA 7, 1920 2826 GI/98 (1) -- 1 of 2 -- 2 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SEC. 3(ii)] MINISTRY OF SOCIAL JUSTICE & EMPOWERMENT NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 29th October, 1998 S.O. 934 (E).— In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (1) and (2) of section 5A of the Prevention of Cruelty to Animals Act, 1960 (59 of 1960), the Central Government hereby notifies the names of the following persons on the Animal Welfare Board of India and for that purpose makes the following amendment in the notification of the government of India in the Ministry of Environment and Forests, number S.O. 495(E) dated the 9th June, 1998 namely :— In the said notification after serial number (22) and the entries relating thereto, the following shall be inserted, namely:— "(23) (24) (25) (26) (27) (28) Dr. K.B. Logani, Deputy Director General (M), Directorate General of Health Services, Nirman Bhavan, New Delhi-110011. Dr. Kartar Singh Dhiman, Senior Lecturer, Government Ayurvedic college, Poprola-176115 Himachal Pradesh. Shri Girdhar Gamang, Member of Parliament (Lok Sabha), 108, V.P. House, New Delhi-110001. Shri Adityanath, Member of Parliament (Lok Sabha), 125, North Avenue, New Delhi-110001. Shri Prasanna Acharya, Member of Parliament (Lok Sabha), 1104, Orissa Bhavan, New Delhi. Prof. Saifuddin Soz, Member of Parliament (Lok Sabha), 7, Tuglak Road, New Delhi-110011. nominated under section 5(1) (d) nominated under section 5(1) (d) elected under section 5(1) (i) elected under section 5(1) (i) elected under section 5(1) (i) elected under section 5(1) (i)" [F. No.1-15/97-A.W.] M.S. AHMAD Jt. Secy. Printed by the Manager, Govt. of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri, New Delhi-110064 and Published by the Controller of Publications, Delhi-110054 —1998. -- 2 of 2 --
